title: Savory Fluffy Moroccan Oxtail Stir-fry
description: A savory and fluffy monsoon-inspired Moroccan dish featuring oxtail with a mix of vegetarian-friendly vegetables to create a delightful fusion cuisine.

ingredients.name: Oxtail
ingredients.notes: Use oxtails that are well-cooked and tender.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped into fine pieces for better flavor integration.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Crushed to release garlic flavor and aroma.

ingredients.name: Tomatoes (canned)
ingredients.notes: Diced to make the dish more flavorful and visually appealing.

ingredients.name: Vegetables blend (e.g., bell peppers, zucchini, eggplant, etc.)

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, bay leaves, and black peppercorns to the pan. Stir-fry for another minute.
Fold in diced tomatoes (canned) and continue cooking until oil starts to separate from tomato juices.
Add oxtail pieces into the pot, ensuring they are coated evenly with the spices and sauce. Cook for about 10 minutes allowing the flavors to meld together.
Reduce heat to low-medium, add chopped vegetables blend to the pot. Stir occasionally for about 10-15 minutes or until the vegetables start to wilt.
Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper according to your taste preference.
Serve hot with steamed rice or couscous.
